items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the guardian/minor signature workflows, which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the existence or functionality of such workflows. The absence of this critical information indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
